name: Ferplast Club Collar C15/44 Purple
description: Key Features & Description • Material & Design: Made from tough, high-quality nylon, this collar is built to withstand everyday wear while remaining lightweight and comfortable for your puppy. The smooth, woven texture is gentle on the skin and fur, preventing chafing during play or walks. Its clean, minimalistic design ensures it looks good on any breed without being bulky or overwhelming for smaller necks. • Adjustability: Equipped with a practical sliding plastic buckle, the collar can be adjusted effortlessly to achieve a snug yet comfortable fit. This ensures your puppy can grow into it without the need for frequent replacements, making it both cost-effective and convenient for pet owners. • Secure Closure: A solid plastic snap clip keeps the collar securely fastened while allowing for quick release when needed. This design offers peace of mind during outdoor activities while ensuring you can remove the collar in seconds if necessary. Practical Use The Ferplast Club Collar C10/25 is the perfect choice for puppy owners who want a safe, comfortable, and long-lasting collar. Its soft yet durable nylon material is gentle on delicate necks, while the adjustable fit accommodates your puppy’s growth. Whether for daily walks, basic training, or simply wearing at home, this collar combines function, safety, and style in one simple design.
